ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "iter" INTEGER /* Iteration number for the model evaluation */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC (Area under the ROC curve) for the model */,
  "logloss" REAL /* Logloss for the model */,
  "precision_weighted" REAL /* Precision of the model with weights */,
  "precision_unweighted" REAL /* Precision of the model without weights */,
  "recall_weighted" REAL /* Recall of the model with weights */,
  "recall_unweighted" REAL /* Recall of the model without weights */,
  "f1_score_weighted" REAL /* F1 Score of the model with weights */,
  "f1_score_unweighted" REAL /* F1 Score of the model without weights */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which this evaluation belongs */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "hyperparams" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
